projects.title: The Homelab
projects.desc: Two-node Proxmox cluster: gateway, SSO, DNS, monitoring, NAS + backup, media, automation. Public via Cloudflare Tunnel — no exposed home IP.
projects.longDesc: A two-node Proxmox cluster running the whole stack: reverse-proxy gateway, SSO, internal DNS, monitoring and metrics, NAS + backup tiers, media services, and automation. Public services reach the world through a Cloudflare Tunnel — no exposed home IP.
projects.stackLine: Proxmox · NPM · Authelia · n8n · Nextcloud · Immich · Jellyfin · Grafana

projects.title: Kinetika HQ
projects.desc: A single static launcher for every internal tool, served by Caddy behind SSO. The front door to the homelab.
projects.longDesc: A single static launcher for every internal tool, served by Caddy behind SSO. The card catalog auto-derives public routes; private endpoints stay in an untracked local config. It's the front door to the homelab.

projects.title: Kost HQ
projects.desc: Property management run over WhatsApp with Baileys — tenants, payments and operations in the channel people already use.
projects.longDesc: Property management run over WhatsApp using Baileys — tenants, payments, and operations handled in the channel people already use. A v2 on the AX layer is on the roadmap.

projects.title: Kinetika Design System
projects.desc: Framework-neutral tokens through a WCAG AA contrast gate, with a React component layer. Codenamed ir0nm0nk. Released CC0.
projects.longDesc: Framework-neutral design tokens through a WCAG AA contrast gate, plus a React component layer. Codenamed ir0nm0nk. Released CC0.

projects.title: KinetikaOS
projects.desc: An Arch-based productivity distro — ROCm preconfigured, a GNOME theme in the ir0nm0nk identity. On hold while the design system matures as the base.
projects.longDesc: An Arch-based distribution in Workstation and Server editions — ROCm preconfigured, a GNOME theme in the ir0nm0nk identity, and an installer script. Currently on hold while the design system matures as the base layer.

projects.title: ir0nm0nk
projects.desc: The dual-Xeon, RTX 3060 edge compute node and second cluster member, running creative-AI workloads. Lent its name to the design system's default skin.
projects.longDesc: The dual-Xeon, RTX 3060 edge compute node and second Proxmox cluster member. It runs creative-AI workloads and lent its name to the design system's default skin.
